_doc: DEVELOPMENT LOOP work-list (parallel to the recovery/research loop). The DEV cron fires one item per run: pick the FIRST item with status!='done', build it per 'how', compile-verify server+client in BACKGROUND shells (0 errors), do the static dup-key check (every new Init id has exactly ONE xml object; no name Init'd twice), set status='done' + add a 'result' note, append a line to docs/build_progress.md, then STOP. ALWAYS run the base-game collision check before building a new boss/dungeon (grep base xml + behaviors for the id; if it exists, ENRICH the base behavior, do NOT duplicate). Free IDs: enemies 0x8f0f+ and 0x8fd7-0x8fdf; portal 0x8215+; item 0x8f62+. Build cmds: export PATH="$HOME/.dotnet:$PATH"; dotnet build server/wServer/wServer.csproj -c Debug --nologo -v q   |   cd client && bash build-client.sh. Client XML changes need the OrdinaryClient_Bosses.xml .dat re-synced (cp to client/src/kabam/rotmg/assets/EmbeddedData_OC_BossesCXML.dat).
